artifact_for: OSP Paper 3 — Concept Anchoring: From Human Sentences to Bound Project Work
author: Volkan Er
note: sha256 values computed over repository LF-normalized content (canonical stored form). CRLF working-tree hashes will differ; repository-form is authoritative.

files.purpose: End-to-end binding chain: sentence to RuleCandidate to Task (8 steps, Step 1 real pipeline, Step 6 real promotion)
Six rejected-path replays proving gates refuse invalid input (AxisMismatch, AxisNotInCandidates, TemplateNotSuggested, NotAccepted, NotFound/StaleBasis, NotPromotableFrom)
Five held-out adversarial sentences (4 held_out + 1 regression_anchored) — non-tautological conformance
13 golden + 5 held-out conformance results (five-state: Conform 12, PartialConform 2, KnownLimitation 2, RejectAsExpected 2, UnexpectedFailure 0)

integrity_note: sha256 values are computed over repository LF-normalized content. run-metadata.json is intentionally excluded from this manifest — it is a sibling integrity file, not a child of the pack; the two reference each other.
excluded_files: run-metadata.json (sibling integrity file, not part of manifest scope)
